message:
refactor: extract rowsToColumnArrays() — deduplicate append column encoding

local-executor.ts and master-do.ts had 45 lines of near-identical
row-to-column conversion code that had already diverged (boolean encoding
mismatch fixed in 0044894). Extracted to rowsToColumnArrays() in
wasm-engine.ts, colocated with buildFragment() which consumes the result.

Net -28 lines.
